name: katarina-skills
description: A bundle of 12 generative, interactive, and visualization skills for Claude Code: marching-squares contours, 3D terrain with overlay lines, filled-band topology, minimap/radar HUDs, generative tree meshes, highlightable grass fields, swimming fish tanks, realtime presence pings, proximity audio mapping, operable vehicle meshes, SVG path-grow animation, and a p5.js+React portal pattern.
